message: feat(gitignore): Add .gitignore for benchmarks and build artifacts

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# Compiled binaries
+*_metal0
+*_go
+*_rust
+*.exe
+
+# Rust build artifacts
+rust/
+target/
+Cargo.lock
+
+# Go build artifacts
+go.sum
+
+# Python cache
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
+*.pyo
+.pytest_cache/
+
+# Benchmark generated files
+*.pem
+results.md
+*.hash
+
+# Temporary benchmark sources (generated by bench.sh)
+*.py
+!bench.sh
+*.go
+*.rs
